title: Agents, Workflows, and the Control Loop · Control-Loop Lens: Environment State
summary: Compare a fixed workflow with an adaptive tool-using agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops environment state increment in an agent-system boundary map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate model context, application state, external state, and durable records.
Model the observe, decide, act, and verify cycle with explicit state transitions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
